text:
**Subject: Synergizing Our Cross-Functional Deliverables for Q3 Success**

---

Hi Team,

I wanted to reach out and loop you in on some exciting developments as we move the needle on our core initiatives going forward.

As we continue to leverage our key learnings from last quarter, it's become increasingly clear that we need to ideate around a more holistic, 360-degree approach to our value proposition. To that end, I'd like to socialize the idea of standing up a task force to help us boil the ocean on our strategic pillars.

Going forward, let's make sure we're all rowing in the same direction. I'll be circling back with stakeholders to ensure we have full bandwidth alignment before we peel back the onion on the implementation phase. At the end of the day, it's about moving fast, failing forward, and keeping the big rocks top of mind.

Let's plan to take this offline and blue-sky it in a dedicated sync. I'll have my team reach out to find a time that works for all relevant parties to touch base and get our ducks in a row.

Please don't hesitate to ping me if you have any action items you'd like to put on my radar. My door is always open.

Best,
LLM
